subtitle: The stone of unconditional love and emotional healing
heroDesc: Rose Quartz has been cherished across civilizations as the ultimate symbol of love, tenderness, and compassion. Its gentle pink radiance dissolves emotional wounds and replaces them with a warm sense of self-acceptance. Whether you are mending a broken heart or simply inviting more love into your daily life, Rose Quartz offers a soft but steady light that nurtures from the inside out.

perspectives.scientific: Rose Quartz is a pink variety of quartz (SiO₂) that derives its delicate color from trace amounts of titanium, iron, or manganese within the crystal lattice. It has a Mohs hardness of 7, making it suitable for carved beads and cabochons used in jewelry. Notable sources include Madagascar, Brazil, and India, and it often occurs in massive form rather than as well-defined crystals, though rarer translucent specimens are prized by collectors.
perspectives.spiritual: Rose Quartz is universally recognized as the stone of the heart chakra, the energy center that governs love, forgiveness, and emotional balance. In ancient Egyptian and Roman cultures it was used as a talisman for beauty and reconciliation. Associated with the zodiac signs of Taurus and Libra, Rose Quartz carries a nurturing vibration that promotes self-love, romantic harmony, and compassionate communication in all relationships.
perspectives.psychological: The soft pink hue of Rose Quartz aligns with feelings of safety, warmth, and emotional openness according to color psychology research. Therapists who integrate crystal work into their practice often recommend Rose Quartz to clients processing grief or building self-esteem. Its reassuring presence encourages vulnerability and emotional honesty, which are essential foundations for healthy interpersonal connections.

benefits.title: Opens the Heart to Love
benefits.desc: Rose Quartz dissolves emotional barriers and opens the heart chakra, making space for new love, deeper friendships, and warmer family bonds.

benefits.title: Promotes Self-Love and Acceptance
benefits.desc: By encouraging compassion toward yourself, Rose Quartz helps quiet the inner critic and fosters a healthier self-image.

benefits.title: Heals Emotional Wounds
benefits.desc: This stone gently releases trapped grief, resentment, and heartache, allowing emotional scars to soften and transform over time.

benefits.title: Restores Trust and Harmony
benefits.desc: Rose Quartz encourages honest, loving communication, making it an ideal companion for couples working through conflict or rebuilding trust.

benefits.title: Reduces Stress and Tension
benefits.desc: The soothing energy of Rose Quartz calms the nervous system and creates an atmosphere of peace, whether worn on the body or placed in a shared living space.

benefits.title: Supports Healthy Sleep
benefits.desc: Keeping Rose Quartz near your bed promotes relaxation and can help ease the anxiety that often disrupts restful sleep.

benefits.title: Enhances Fertility and Feminine Energy
benefits.desc: Traditionally linked to feminine vitality, Rose Quartz is carried to support reproductive health, hormonal balance, and a nurturing creative energy.

usageScenes.title: Wear It Daily
usageScenes.desc: Wear a Rose Quartz bracelet on your left wrist to keep its loving energy close to your heart center throughout the day. It layers beautifully with Amethyst for a calming, heart-centered combination.

usageScenes.title: Meditation Companion
usageScenes.desc: Place Rose Quartz over your heart chakra during lying-down meditation. Breathe into its warmth and visualize pink light filling your chest, dissolving tension with each exhale.

usageScenes.title: Home Sanctuary
usageScenes.desc: Set Rose Quartz chunks in your bedroom, living room, or anywhere your family gathers. It promotes a harmonious atmosphere and helps resolve lingering tension between household members.

usageScenes.title: Ritual & Ceremony
usageScenes.desc: Use Rose Quartz in love-drawing rituals by charging it under a full moon and placing it on a written intention. It is also a meaningful stone to exchange in commitment or handfasting ceremonies.

pairings.name: Amethyst
pairings.why: Amethyst brings mental clarity and spiritual insight that pairs perfectly with Rose Quartz's emotional warmth, creating a balanced heart-mind energy.

pairings.name: Moonstone
pairings.why: Moonstone enhances Rose Quartz's feminine, nurturing qualities and deepens its connection to intuition and new beginnings.

pairings.name: Clear Quartz
pairings.why: Clear Quartz amplifies Rose Quartz's loving vibration and adds programmable intention, making your heart-centered goals even more potent.

relatedCrystals.name: Green Aventurine
relatedCrystals.benefit: Known as the stone of opportunity, it complements Rose Quartz by attracting luck alongside love

relatedCrystals.name: Moonstone
relatedCrystals.benefit: Deepens intuition and supports new chapters in love and life

relatedCrystals.name: Citrine
relatedCrystals.benefit: Adds sunny confidence and abundance energy to Rose Quartz's gentle warmth

relatedCrystals.name: Howlite
relatedCrystals.benefit: Calms an overactive mind, helping you receive Rose Quartz's messages of self-love more clearly

faqs.title: Can I sleep with Rose Quartz?
faqs.content: Absolutely. Rose Quartz is one of the best crystals to keep near your bed. Its calming energy promotes relaxation and can help you fall asleep more easily, especially if anxiety or heartache has been keeping you awake.

faqs.title: How do I cleanse Rose Quartz?
faqs.content: Gently rinse Rose Quartz under lukewarm running water, then pat it dry. You can also cleanse it with sage smoke, place it on a Selenite slab, or bury it in dry sea salt overnight. Avoid harsh chemicals and prolonged sun exposure, which may fade the pink color.

faqs.title: Does Rose Quartz really attract love?
faqs.content: Rose Quartz does not magically summon a partner, but it does help open your heart chakra, release emotional blockages, and cultivate self-love. Many people find that carrying it shifts their mindset toward receptivity, which naturally draws healthier connections into their life.

faqs.title: Can I wear Rose Quartz every day?
faqs.content: Yes, Rose Quartz is durable enough for daily wear with a Mohs hardness of 7. Just remove it before heavy physical activity or exposure to harsh chemicals, and cleanse it regularly to keep the energy fresh.

faqs.title: What is the difference between Rose Quartz and Pink Quartz?
faqs.content: Rose Quartz is the common massive pink variety, always slightly cloudy. Pink Quartz is a rarer, more transparent form that sometimes forms visible crystals and may fade in sunlight. For jewelry and healing purposes, Rose Quartz is the standard choice.
